'''Firedrakes''' were large flying proboscised [[Insect/Legends|insects]] native to [[Gallinore]] that lit up in [[Color/Legends|colored]] light, heat, and energy. They came out of their habitat, usually caves, at dusk. The insects communicated to each other via their blinks, with short blinks indicating a summon. Firedrakes might attack anything their size or smaller while hunting, which [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] and [[Tenel Ka Djo|Tenel Ka]] experienced. They distracted their prey with the flashes and ambushed in packs.

Firedrakes were brought to other worlds such as [[Hapes/Legends|Hapes]], but they did not adapt to them.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Journey]]'' {{1st}}
